info.title: Diabetes 360 API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Diabetes 360 health management application

data.description: Error response data - null for most errors, empty array [] for array endpoints

profileComplete.description: Indicates if the user profile is complete (for customer role)

profileData.description: User profile data - CustomerData for customers, PhysicianData for physicians, null if profile not complete

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

tags.name: Health Metrics
tags.description: Health metrics tracking and management endpoints

get.summary: Get all users (Admin only)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return

customerData.description: Optional for customer role. At least diabetesType is required.

birthday.description: Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate birthDay/birthMonth/birthYear fields

diagnosisDate.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate diagnosisDay/diagnosisMonth/diagnosisYear fields

weight.description: Optional - defaults to '70' if not provided

height.description: Optional - defaults to '170' if not provided

get.summary: Get user by ID (Admin only)

customerData.description: Included if user role is customer and customer data exists

birthday.description: Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate birthDay/birthMonth/birthYear fields

diagnosisDate.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate diagnosisDay/diagnosisMonth/diagnosisYear fields

post.summary: Authenticate user and get access tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired refresh token

post.summary: Logout user and invalidate refresh token

400.description: Bad request - invalid token or validation error

404.description: Reset token not found or expired

get.summary: Get all available slot sizes
Get all available slot types
Get all availability dates for the authenticated physician

post.summary: Create an availability date for the authenticated physician

get.summary: Get dates with availability for a physician

locationIds.description: Array of location IDs for offline/onsite consultations (optional)

get.summary: Get slots for a physician on a specific date
Get available (unbooked) slots for a physician on a specific date

delete.summary: Delete a slot (physician only, cannot delete booked slots)

patch.summary: Update slot price (physician or admin, cannot update booked slots)
Update slot locations (physician or admin, cannot update booked slots)

locationIds.description: Array of location IDs for offline/onsite consultations

400.description: Invalid request (slot is booked or invalid data)

403.description: Forbidden (not the slot owner or admin)

slotId.description: The ID of the slot to book

slotTypeId.description: The ID of the slot type (online/onsite) selected by the user. Must be one of the slot types available for this slot.

400.description: Bad request (missing slotId or slotTypeId, invalid slot type, or slot already booked)

get.summary: Get physician dates with availability counts and slots

parameters.name: isCount
parameters.description: If true, returns dates with available booking counts. If false, skips the dates query.

parameters.name: selectedDate
parameters.description: Selected date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2024-12-25). Returns organized slots for this date.

200.description: Physician dates and slots retrieved successfully

dates.description: Array of dates with available booking counts (only if isCount is true)

count.description: Number of available bookings for this date

slots.description: Array of organized slots for the selected date (only if selectedDate is provided)

locations.description: Locations for offline/onsite consultations (only if applicable)

isBooked.description: Whether the slot is already booked

400.description: Bad request (invalid parameters, date format, or query range)

get.summary: Calculate booking price for a physician consultation
Get customer profile data

birthday.description: Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate birthDay/birthMonth/birthYear fields

diagnosisDate.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate diagnosisDay/diagnosisMonth/diagnosisYear fields

birthday.description: Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate birthDay/birthMonth/birthYear fields

diagnosisDate.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate diagnosisDay/diagnosisMonth/diagnosisYear fields

400.description: Invalid data or profile already completed

birthday.description: Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate birthDay/birthMonth/birthYear fields

diagnosisDate.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or send separate diagnosisDay/diagnosisMonth/diagnosisYear fields

get.summary: Get user consultation quotas

post.summary: Add a new health metric entry

schema.description: userId is automatically extracted from the authenticated user's token

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

400.description: Bad request - validation error, limit exceeded, or heart rate feature requires paid tier

get.summary: Get the latest health metric and daily limits for the current user
get.description: Returns the most recent health metric entry, the previous entry (for comparison), and the current free tier daily limits configuration. Both `current` and `previous` are partial HealthMetric objects that may contain any subset of health metric fields (bloodSugar, steps, waterIntake, heartRate).

200.description: Latest metric and tier limits retrieved successfully

current.description: The most recent health metric entry (partial HealthMetric)

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

previous.description: The previous health metric entry before the current one (partial HealthMetric)

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

get.summary: Get paginated health metrics for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of metrics to return

data.description: Array of health metrics, empty array returned on error

get.summary: Get health metrics for chart visualization

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of data to retrieve

get.summary: Get today's metric count(s) for the current user

parameters.name: metricType
parameters.description: Optional - Get count for specific metric type. If omitted, returns counts for all types.

oneOf.description: When metricType query param is provided
When metricType query param is omitted

get.summary: Get aggregated health statistics (daily, weekly, monthly averages)

daily.description: Daily average blood sugar in mg/dL

weekly.description: Weekly average blood sugar in mg/dL

monthly.description: Monthly average blood sugar in mg/dL

daily.description: Daily average water intake in liters

weekly.description: Weekly average water intake in liters

monthly.description: Monthly average water intake in liters

get.summary: Get filtered health metrics by date range and metric types

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: JSON array string of metric types to filter. Can be passed as JSON string or single value. Valid values are blood_sugar, water_intake, steps, and heart_beat. If not provided, all types are returned.

post.summary: Log a time-based activity (walking or yoga)

schema.description: userId is automatically extracted from the authenticated user's token

hours.description: Hours spent (will be converted to minutes)

get.summary: Get activity logs for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return

get.summary: Get today's activity logs
Get total activity minutes for today

schema.description: userId is automatically extracted from the authenticated user's token

get.summary: Get exercise logs for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of logs to return

get.summary: Get today's exercise logs
Get today's exercise totals by type
Get strength training progress percentage

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to calculate progress over

get.summary: Get all active specialties for consultation
Get paginated physicians with search and specialty filtering
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of physicians. You can filter the list by specialty and search by name or specialty keyword. All query parameters are optional.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to retrieve (starts from 1). Default is 1.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of physicians per page (default is 10; max is 100).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter by physician name or specialty. If set to "all", all physicians will be shown (only applies when specialtyId is not provided).

parameters.name: specialtyId
parameters.description: Filter physicians by a specific specialty ID.

400.description: Bad request (invalid page, limit, or specialtyId)

get.summary: Get physicians by specialty for consultation
Get physician rating

physicianId.description: ID of the physician being rated

get.summary: Get all specialties (Admin only)
Get specialty by ID (Admin only)
Get physician data by user ID (Admin only)

image.description: Image file to upload (max 5MB, allowed types jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp)

400.description: Invalid file or file too large

get.summary: Get all locations for a specific physician (Admin only)
Get all locations for the authenticated physician

post.summary: Create a new location for the authenticated physician

patch.summary: Update a location for the authenticated physician

delete.summary: Delete a location for the authenticated physician

get.summary: Get free tier limits configuration
get.description: Returns the current free tier limits for glucose, steps, and water intake metrics

post.description: Create new free tier limits. Will fail if limits already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

400.description: Bad request - validation error or limits already exist

put.summary: Create or update free tier limits (Admin only)
put.description: Upsert operation - creates limits if they don't exist, or updates if they do

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

patch.summary: Partially update free tier limits (Admin only)
patch.description: Update only specified limit fields. Limits must already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

get.summary: Get current user's profile with profile data
